name: OOPARTS by OK
description: OOPARTS on BITMAP. Art reinscribed in BITMAP. Imagine one art lurking in one place. When it becomes a real plot, there is already a treasure there. A form of coexistence with DMT. 111 OOPARTS in all.Out-of-place artifacts are excavated objects or artifacts that are thought to be completely out of place in the place or time in which they were discovered.
